title: The Great Museum Robbery

scenes.text: Stolen artifacts worth millions vanished in a single night.
It happened in Antwerp, at the Museum of Fine Arts.
In 2001, thieves executed a perfect heist, stealing art valued at 100 million euros.
The museum is still haunted by the absence of its treasures.
To this day, the art has never been recovered.
scenes.label: NEVER RECOVERED

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Antwerp, Belgium - 2001. A daring museum robbery led to the theft of art valued at 100 million euros, and it remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
